titles.title: Border Drone Threat Assessment Act
Military Construction Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027

An original bill to authorize appropriations for fiscal year 2027 for military activities of the Department of Defense, for military construction, and for defense activities of the Department of Energy, to prescribe military personnel strengths for such fiscal year, and for other purposes.

An original bill to authorize appropriations for fiscal year 2027 for military activities of the Department of Defense, for military construction, and for defense activities of the Department of Energy, to prescribe military personnel strengths for such fiscal year, and for other purposes.

action.text: Committee on Armed Services. Original measure reported to Senate by Senator Wicker. With written report No. 119-127.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 436.
